name: luna-ai-cut
description: Insta360 Luna Ultra Wi-Fi 桌面媒体管理工具
author: diamondfsd

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.pack:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs --target darwin --arch arm64 && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.pack:win:x64: pnpm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs --target win32 --arch x64 && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.pack:mac:x64: pnpm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs --target darwin --arch x64 && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.pack:debug:mac:arm64: npm run build:debug && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --config electron-builder-debug.json5 --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.pack:debug:win:x64: npm run build:debug && electron-builder --config electron-builder-debug.json5 --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.pack:debug:mac:x64: npm run build:debug && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --config electron-builder-debug.json5 --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
